title: SeasonEventController
description: SEC is a mod that gives you control over ingame seasonal events (Christmas chests and Halloween pumpkins)
body:
**SEC** is a simple fabric mod that allows you to:
1. Force Enable
2. Force Disable 
3. Leave at vanilla behavior

seasonal ingame events like Christmas chests (Client-Side only) and Pumpkin heads for mobs on Halloween (Server-side only if on server)
